# Fanny Chudy (Schillinger)

Fanny Chudy (Schillinger) is a Senior Compliance Product Leader and Senior Compliance & Financial Crime leader based in Luxembourg and available for remote-friendly roles across Europe.

Core expertise: AI Governance, EU AI Act readiness, Responsible AI, AI Compliance, Financial Crime, AML/CFT, KYC, KYT, MiCA, Digital Assets, Crypto Compliance, Blockchain, RegTech, FinTech, Product Compliance, Product Governance, Compliance by Design, Regulatory Strategy, Risk Management and platform building.

Professional positioning: Fanny turns regulation into compliant products by bridging Compliance, Product, Engineering, Legal and Risk teams for banks, fintechs, digital asset companies and AI-driven financial services.

Website: https://fannychudy.com/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/fanny-chudy-schillinger-64a20b169/
GitHub: https://github.com/FannyTech
Email: fanny.chudy@gmail.com
